description: Maps enterprise automation requests to in-repo scripts. External-only items are noted honestly.

runtime_authority.external: GitHub/Railway/Render live revision compare requires platform APIs + tokens (not in repo).

closed_loop.note: Full auto-deploy+rollback is operator-owned; gate + recovery scripts are the safe in-repo chain.

production_validation.note: Pixel-perfect visual AI QA is partial; baseline verify + probes cover what ships in-tree.

predictive_failure.note: Heuristic risk score from local runtime-sync + autonomy history — not ML.

multi_agent.note: Supervisor + task_state is the coordinator; parallel lanes = multiple Railway workers with SKIP LOCKED.

visual_qa.note: No separate vision model; checksum/baseline + HTTP probes.

production_readiness_proof.note: Evidence-weighted score from executed gates; 95–98% autonomous claim only when --full + live probe + env signals pass (still excludes unsupervised git/deploy).
